sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْكَافِي ضَرُورِيٌّ لِصِحَّةِ الْعَقْلِ وَالتَّرْكِيزِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje i koncentraciju.
sentences.translationEn: Sufficient sleep is necessary for mental health and concentration.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْبَالِغُونَ إِلَى ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ الرَّاحَةِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli trebaju osam sati odmora svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Adults need eight hours of rest every night.

sentences.arabic: يُقَلِّلُ الِاسْتِرْخَاءُ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ وَالْقَلَقِ.
sentences.translation: Opuštanje prije spavanja smanjuje stres i anksioznost.
sentences.translationEn: Relaxation before sleep reduces stress and anxiety.
